title: Terrain Biomes
summary: Add 4 terrain biomes (Spring, Winter, Desert, Autumn) that swap ground/sky colors and scenery emoji via CSS custom properties + a simple cycling button. Biome affects random generator scenery choices. Preference persists in localStorage.

tasks.title: Add biome CSS custom property overrides
tasks.description: Add body.biome-winter, body.biome-desert, body.biome-autumn CSS rules that override --grass, --grass-dark, --grass-hover, --sky, --sky-gradient-start, --sky-gradient-end, --sidebar-top, --sidebar-bottom, --header-color. Spring is the default (:root). Place these BEFORE body.night-mode so night mode takes priority. Also add water tile biome variants (frozen ice for winter, oasis tint for desert, murky for autumn).
acceptance: body.biome-winter sets white/ice-blue grass, cold sky, frosty sidebar colors
body.biome-desert sets tan/sand grass, warm sky, warm sidebar colors
body.biome-autumn sets orange-brown grass, warm orange sky, earthy sidebar
Night mode overrides biome colors (night always dark regardless of biome)
All biome color transitions use 0.5s transition (already inherited from existing transition rules)
Winter water tiles get frozen/ice appearance
Desert water tiles get oasis/warm tint

tasks.title: Add biome state, constants, and emoji override system
tasks.description: Add BIOMES array, BIOME_EMOJI_OVERRIDES map, BIOME_ICONS map, currentBiome state variable, getCurrentBiome() function, and getSceneryEmoji(type) function that returns biome-aware emoji. Store biome in localStorage.
acceptance: BIOMES = ['spring', 'winter', 'desert', 'autumn']
Winter overrides: tree→🎄, flower→❄️
Desert overrides: tree→🌵, flower→🌾
Autumn overrides: tree→🍂, flower→🍁
getSceneryEmoji(type) returns correct biome-aware emoji
localStorage key 'trainTracks_biome' persists preference

tasks.title: Replace all SCENERY_EMOJI[type] with getSceneryEmoji(type)
tasks.description: Find all places that read from SCENERY_EMOJI directly for display purposes and replace with getSceneryEmoji() call. Keep SCENERY_EMOJI as the base map.
tasks.section: Multiple locations (renderCell, createPaletteSVG, ghost rendering, etc.)
acceptance: renderCell uses getSceneryEmoji for scenery emoji text
createPaletteSVG uses getSceneryEmoji
Ghost/drag preview uses getSceneryEmoji
Toast messages use getSceneryEmoji
Palette re-renders on biome change to show new emoji

tasks.title: Add biome cycle button to controls bar
tasks.description: Add a button in the controls bar that cycles through biomes. Shows current biome icon. On click: advance to next biome, apply CSS class, re-render all cells and palette, save preference.
acceptance: Button shows current biome icon (🌸 Spring, ❄️ Winter, 🏜️ Desert, 🍂 Autumn)
Click cycles to next biome with smooth CSS transition
All cells re-render with new scenery emoji
Palette pieces re-render with new emoji
Toast shows biome name on switch
Keyboard shortcut 'B' toggles biome

tasks.title: Biome-aware random generator
tasks.description: Modify addRandomScenery() and generateRiver() to respect current biome. Winter: lower river chance (10%). Desert: no river at all. Adjust scenery weights per biome.
acceptance: Desert biome: no river generated
Winter biome: river chance reduced to 10% (frozen rivers less common)
Scenery weights shift per biome (e.g., more trees in autumn)
Random generator output looks appropriate for each biome

tasks.title: Restore biome on init + keyboard shortcut
tasks.description: On init(), restore biome from localStorage and apply CSS class. Add 'B' keyboard shortcut for biome cycling. Add biome to keyboard shortcuts overlay. Also add biome button to mobile drawer or ensure it's accessible on mobile.
acceptance: Biome persists across page refreshes
B key cycles biomes (not during play or modal)
Shortcuts overlay shows B = Biome
Biome button visible and functional on mobile

testing_focus: All 4 biomes look visually distinct and appealing
Night mode works correctly with each biome (night takes priority)
Track pieces remain clearly visible in all biomes
Water tiles have appropriate appearance per biome
Random generator respects biome (no rivers in desert, etc.)
